---
title: "Research Tools and Resources"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    container-fluid: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header-bar">
  <h1>Research Tools and Resources</h1>
  <p>Comprehensive tools and resources to support your living meta-analysis research</p>
</div>

<div class="resources-page-content">

  <!-- Filter Bar -->
  <div class="resource-filter-bar">
    <div class="filter-buttons">
      <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All Resources</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="protocol">Protocol Development</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="statistical">Statistical Resources</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="reporting">Reporting &amp; Registration</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="reference">Reference Management</button>
    </div>
    <div class="filter-search">
      <input type="text" id="resourceSearch" placeholder="Search resources..." class="resource-search-input" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Resource Cards -->
  <div class="resource-card-grid">

    <!-- Protocol Development -->
    <div class="resource-card" data-category="protocol" data-type="tool">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Protocol Checklist Tool</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-tool">Tool</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        When creating a project proposal for a Living Meta-Analysis on AMORE, include all necessary information for a smooth review process. This checklist outlines the key components required in your proposal.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="Protocol_checklist.html" class="resource-button">Access Checklist</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistical Resources -->
    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="textbook">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Introduction to Meta-Analysis</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-textbook">Textbook</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        A comprehensive introduction to the principles and practices of meta-analysis, covering effect size estimation, heterogeneity, publication bias, and advanced techniques.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/book/10.1002/9780470743386" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Access Textbook</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="textbook">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Doing Meta-Analysis with R: A Hands-On Guide</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-textbook">Textbook</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        A hands-on guide to conducting meta-analyses in R, covering effect sizes, heterogeneity, publication bias, multilevel meta-analysis, and Bayesian approaches.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://bookdown.org/MathiasHarrer/Doing_Meta_Analysis_in_R/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Access Textbook</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="software">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>R and RStudio</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-software">Software</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        R is a programming language for statistical computing and graphics. RStudio provides an integrated development environment with a user-friendly interface. Together, they are widely used for data analysis and visualization.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://www.r-project.org/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit R Project</a>
        <a href="https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/" class="resource-button secondary" target="_blank">Visit RStudio</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="article">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>A Review of Meta-Analysis Packages in R</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-article">Article</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        An overview of commonly used R packages for conducting meta-analyses, discussing features, capabilities, and limitations to help researchers choose the right tool.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.3102/1076998616674315?icid=int.sj-full-text.similar-articles.2" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Read Article</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="software">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>JASP</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-software">Software</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        Free, open-source statistical software with a user-friendly interface for conducting analyses. Suitable for researchers with varying levels of statistical expertise.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://jasp-stats.org/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit JASP</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="article">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Adjusting for Publication Bias in JASP and R</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-article">Article</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        Covers selection models, PET-PEESE, and robust Bayesian meta-analysis for adjusting publication bias, with practical implementation guidance for both JASP and R.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/25152459221109259" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Read Article</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="statistical" data-type="article">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Equivalence Tests</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-article">Article</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        A practical introduction to equivalence testing with guidance on performing equivalence tests and power analyses in psychological research.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/1948550617697177" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Read Article</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Reporting & Registration -->
    <div class="resource-card" data-category="reporting" data-type="tool">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>PRISMA for Living Systematic Reviews</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-tool">Tool</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        An extension of the PRISMA statement providing guidance on reporting living systematic reviews. Includes a checklist and flow diagram for best practice.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="http://prisma-statement.org/lsr" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit PRISMA</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="reporting" data-type="database">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>PROSPERO</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-database">Database</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        A registration platform specifically designed for systematic review protocols focused on health-related research. Provides a standardized format for documenting methods before reviews begin.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/prospero/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit PROSPERO</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="reporting" data-type="database">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Open Science Framework (OSF)</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-database">Database</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        A free, open-source platform supporting project management, data sharing, pre-registration, and collaboration for transparent research practices.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://osf.io/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit OSF</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Reference Management -->
    <div class="resource-card" data-category="reference" data-type="tool">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Retraction Watch</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-tool">Tool</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        Tracks retractions of scientific papers as a window into the scientific process. Essential for maintaining the integrity of living meta-analyses.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://retractionwatch.com/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit Retraction Watch</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card" data-category="reference" data-type="software">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <h3>Zotero</h3>
        <span class="resource-type-badge badge-software">Software</span>
      </div>
      <div class="resource-description">
        Reference management software that helps collect, organize, and cite research. Alerts users when articles have been retracted or corrected.
      </div>
      <div class="resource-links">
        <a href="https://www.zotero.org/" class="resource-button" target="_blank">Visit Zotero</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- No results message -->
  <div class="no-results" style="display: none;">
    <p>No resources match your search. Try a different keyword or clear the filter.</p>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
  var searchInput = document.getElementById('resourceSearch');
  var cards = document.querySelectorAll('.resource-card');
  var noResults = document.querySelector('.no-results');
  var activeFilter = 'all';

  function filterCards() {
    var searchTerm = searchInput.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    var visibleCount = 0;

    cards.forEach(function(card) {
      var category = card.getAttribute('data-category');
      var text = card.textContent.toLowerCase();
      var matchesFilter = (activeFilter === 'all' || category === activeFilter);
      var matchesSearch = (!searchTerm || text.indexOf(searchTerm) !== -1);

      if (matchesFilter && matchesSearch) {
        card.style.display = '';
        visibleCount++;
      } else {
        card.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });

    noResults.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  filterBtns.forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      filterBtns.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
      btn.classList.add('active');
      activeFilter = btn.getAttribute('data-filter');
      filterCards();
    });
  });

  searchInput.addEventListener('input', filterCards);
});
</script>
```
